name: Red Velvet Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the food coloring and water.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, salt, baking soda, and cocoa powder.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with buttermilk and vanilla extract.
6. Gently fold in 1 tablespoon of vinegar until just combined.
7. Grease two 9-inch cake pans with butter and dust with flour.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
NOTE: Cream cheese frosting is delicious on this cake.
